text.title: Browser Automation Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated browser-automation artefact.

step.name: inventory-screens
step.action: List screens to be exercised; one Page Object per screen.

step.name: wire-data-test-id
step.action: Add data-test-id to every interactive element in the target screens; document naming convention.

step.name: split-extract-and-interact
step.action: Separate interact module (clicks / inputs) from extract module (read text / table data).

step.name: replace-sleeps
step.action: Static-scan for sleep/setTimeout; replace with expect.poll / waitForSelector / role-based assertions.

step.name: track-flake
step.action: Compute flake_rate over rolling 100-run window; fail merge above budget.
